documentation.description: These allow the user to determine which version of SDLAda_Image they compiled with.

constants.name: Compiled
Compiled_Major
constants.code:
Compiled_Major : constant SDL.Versions.Version_Level with
  Import        => True,
  Convention    => C,
  External_Name => "SDL_Ada_Image_Major_Version";

constants.name: Compiled_Minor
constants.code:
Compiled_Minor : constant SDL.Versions.Version_Level with
  Import        => True,
  Convention    => C,
  External_Name => "SDL_Ada_Image_Minor_Version";

constants.name: Compiled_Patch
constants.code:
Compiled_Patch : constant SDL.Versions.Version_Level with
  Import        => True,
  Convention    => C,
  External_Name => "SDL_Ada_Image_Patch_Version";
